text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wondering if I could be of any help to her
research, I scour the library for
Umamusume-related books.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Actually, seeing as we're in a library, I suppose
you came with the intent to read, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What is it that's piqued your interest? Hmm?
choice_data_list: I wanted to help with your research.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: This is... to help with my research?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh, hahaha! How diligent of you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
However, what I require most from you is a
healthy mind and body suitable for testing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If you want to help, then let's start with some
basic bodybuilding!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You're in luck. I just happen to have something
I've been dying to test.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If the experiment is a success, no matter how out
of shape you may be, I can transform you to be fit
like an athlete!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let us begin! The experiment to obtain your
ultimate physique!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh! I can't wait to see the results, Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps pleased by my cooperative attitude,
Agnes Tachyon goes about her business in higher
spirits than usual.
